description: Baseline skills and capabilities safe and useful for every project regardless of product domain: orientation, deterministic repo-context packaging, spec discipline, evidence before done, change-impact review triage, PR feedback triage, secret safety, Markdown knowledge-vault maintenance, and handoff, backed by the review workflow, guardrails, evaluation gate, context packaging, secret scanning, and lightweight spec catalogue capabilities.
notes: browser-qa is intentionally excluded here: not every project has a UI. Every other profile is expected to be a superset of core's skills and capabilities, or to justify in its notes why it omits one.
